# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Debug CI/CD Workflow (Verbose Logging)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: Target environment
        required: true
        default: production
      log_sensitive:
        description: 'DANGEROUS: If true, attempts to print potentially sensitive values (may still be masked by GitHub).'
        required: true
        default: "false"
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: debug-cicd-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  CI_DEBUG: "true"
  LOG_LEVEL: "debug"

jobs:
  debug:
    name: Debug Build/Deploy with Comprehensive Logging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment || 'production' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Context (GitHub / Runner)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "=== Date/Time ==="
          date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"
          echo "=== GitHub Context ==="
          echo "GITHUB_WORKFLOW=$GITHUB_WORKFLOW"
          echo "GITHUB_RUN_ID=$GITHUB_RUN_ID"
          echo "GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER=$GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER"
          echo "GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT=$GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT"
          echo "GITHUB_JOB=$GITHUB_JOB"
          echo "GITHUB_ACTIONS=$GITHUB_ACTIONS"
          echo "GITHUB_ACTOR=$GITHUB_ACTOR"
          echo "GITHUB_REPOSITORY=$GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
          echo "GITHUB_REF=$GITHUB_REF"
          echo "GITHUB_SHA=$GITHUB_SHA"
          echo "GITHUB_HEAD_REF=$GITHUB_HEAD_REF"
          echo "GITHUB_BASE_REF=$GITHUB_BASE_REF"
          echo "GITHUB_EVENT_NAME=$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME"
          echo "GITHUB_SERVER_URL=$GITHUB_SERVER_URL"
          echo "GITHUB_API_URL=$GITHUB_API_URL"
          echo "GITHUB_GRAPHQL_URL=$GITHUB_GRAPHQL_URL"
          echo "RUNNER_NAME=$RUNNER_NAME"
          echo "RUNNER_OS=$RUNNER_OS"
          echo "RUNNER_ARCH=$RUNNER_ARCH"
          echo "RUNNER_TEMP=$RUNNER_TEMP"
          echo "RUNNER_WORKSPACE=$RUNNER_WORKSPACE"
          echo "=== Event payload path ==="
          echo "GITHUB_EVENT_PATH=$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH"
          echo "=== Runner details ==="
          uname -a
          lsb_release -a || true
          echo "=== Disk / Memory ==="
          df -h
          free -m || true
          echo "=== Network ==="
          ip a || true
          ip route || true
          cat /etc/resolv.conf || true

      - name: Log all environment variables (sanitized by GitHub masking)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "=== ENV (sorted) ==="
          printenv | sort

      - name: Tooling versions
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "=== Git ==="
          git --version
          git status --porcelain=v1 || true
          git log -n 20 --oneline --decorate || true
          echo "=== Curl ==="
          curl --version
          echo "=== OpenSSL ==="
          openssl version -a || true
          echo "=== Node (if present) ==="
          node --version || true
          npm --version || true
          echo "=== Python (if present) ==="
          python --version || true
          python3 --version || true
          pip --version || true

      - name: Log repository files (top-level) and key configs
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "=== Repo top-level listing ==="
          ls -la
          echo "=== .github/workflows listing ==="
          ls -la .github/workflows || true
          echo "=== Common config files ==="
          for f in package.json package-lock.json pnpm-lock.yaml yarn.lock requirements.txt pyproject.toml Pipfile Gemfile go.mod Cargo.toml Dockerfile docker-compose.yml; do
            if [ -f "$f" ]; then
              echo "----- $f -----"
              sed -n '1,200p' "$f"
            fi
          done

      - name: Build (placeholder) with full command tracing
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "=== Build step placeholder ==="
          echo "Add your build commands here."
          echo "PWD=$(pwd)"
          echo "Listing workspace:"
          ls -la

      - name: Deployment details (sanitized) and computed connection strings
        shell: bash
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: ${{ inputs.environment || 'production' }}
          API_BASE_URL: ${{ vars.API_BASE_URL }}
          DEPLOY_TARGET: ${{ vars.DEPLOY_TARGET }}
          DB_HOST: ${{ vars.DB_HOST }}
          DB_PORT: ${{ vars.DB_PORT }}
          DB_NAME: ${{ vars.DB_NAME }}
          DB_USER: ${{ vars.DB_USER }}
          DB_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}
          API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.API_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "=== Deployment inputs/vars ==="
          echo "DEPLOY_ENV=$DEPLOY_ENV"
          echo "API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-}"
          echo "DEPLOY_TARGET=${DEPLOY_TARGET:-}"
          echo "DB_HOST=${DB_HOST:-}"
          echo "DB_PORT=${DB_PORT:-}"
          echo "DB_NAME=${DB_NAME:-}"
          echo "DB_USER=${DB_USER:-}"
          echo "DB_PASSWORD is set? $([ -n "${DB_PASSWORD:-}" ] && echo yes || echo no)"
          echo "API_TOKEN is set? $([ -n "${API_TOKEN:-}" ] && echo yes || echo no)"
          echo "=== Derived connection strings (DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION LOGS) ==="
          DB_CONN="postgresql://${DB_USER:-user}:${DB_PASSWORD:-password}@${DB_HOST:-host}:${DB_PORT:-5432}/${DB_NAME:-db}?sslmode=require"
          REDACTED_DB_CONN="$(echo "$DB_CONN" | sed -E 's#(postgresql://[^:]+:)[^@]+#\1***#')"
          echo "DB_CONN_REDACTED=$REDACTED_DB_CONN"
          if [ "${{ inputs.log_sensitive }}" = "true" ]; then
            echo "DB_CONN_FULL=$DB_CONN"
          else
            echo "Sensitive logging disabled. Set workflow_dispatch input log_sensitive=true to print full values (may be masked)."
          fi

      - name: Connectivity checks (DNS/TCP/TLS) to deployment endpoints
        shell: bash
        env:
          API_BASE_URL: ${{ vars.API_BASE_URL }}
          DB_HOST: ${{ vars.DB_HOST }}
          DB_PORT: ${{ vars.DB_PORT }}
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "=== Connectivity checks ==="
          if [ -n "${API_BASE_URL:-}" ]; then
            echo "API_BASE_URL=$API_BASE_URL"
            API_HOST="$(echo "$API_BASE_URL" | awk -F[/:] '{print $4}')"
            echo "API_HOST=$API_HOST"
            getent hosts "$API_HOST" || true
            echo "=== TLS handshake (API host:443) ==="
            timeout 15 openssl s_client -connect "${API_HOST}:443" -servername "$API_HOST" -showcerts </dev/null 2>&1 | sed -n '1,200p' || true
          fi
          if [ -n "${DB_HOST:-}" ]; then
            echo "DB_HOST=$DB_HOST"
            getent hosts "$DB_HOST" || true
            echo "=== TCP check to DB ==="
            timeout 10 bash -c "cat < /dev/null > /dev/tcp/${DB_HOST}/${DB_PORT:-5432}" && echo "DB port reachable" || echo "DB port not reachable"
          fi

      - name: Call API and log full response (headers/body)
        shell: bash
        env:
          API_BASE_URL: ${{ vars.API_BASE_URL }}
          API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.API_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "=== API request/response logging ==="
          if [ -z "${API_BASE_URL:-}" ]; then
            echo "API_BASE_URL not set; skipping."
            exit 0
          fi
          echo "GET ${API_BASE_URL%/}/health"
          curl -vkS \
            -D /tmp/api_headers.txt \
            -o /tmp/api_body.txt \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${API_TOKEN}" \
            "${API_BASE_URL%/}/health" || true
          echo "=== API RESPONSE HEADERS ==="
          cat /tmp/api_headers.txt || true
          echo "=== API RESPONSE BODY ==="
          cat /tmp/api_body.txt || true

      - name: Deploy (placeholder) with detailed logging
        shell: bash
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: ${{ inputs.environment || 'production' }}
          DEPLOY_TARGET: ${{ vars.DEPLOY_TARGET }}
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_KEY }}
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          echo "=== Deploy step placeholder ==="
          echo "DEPLOY_ENV=$DEPLOY_ENV"
          echo "DEPLOY_TARGET=${DEPLOY_TARGET:-}"
          echo "DEPLOY_KEY is set? $([ -n "${DEPLOY_KEY:-}" ] && echo yes || echo no)"
          echo "Add your real deployment commands here, ensuring they run with set -x to echo commands."
          echo "Example:"
          echo "  set -x"
          echo "  ./deploy.sh --target \"$DEPLOY_TARGET\" --env \"$DEPLOY_ENV\""

      - name: Collect logs/artifacts for troubleshooting
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euxo pipefail
          mkdir -p debug_artifacts
          echo "=== Collecting debug artifacts ==="
          cp -f /tmp/api_headers.txt debug_artifacts/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp -f /tmp/api_body.txt debug_artifacts/ 2>/dev/null || true
          echo "=== GitHub event payload (first 400 lines) ==="
          if [ -f "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH" ]; then
            sed -n '1,400p' "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH" > debug_artifacts/github_event.json.txt
          fi
          echo "=== Final env snapshot ==="
          printenv | sort > debug_artifacts/env_sorted.txt
          echo "=== Workspace tree (depth 4) ==="
          (command -v tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && tree -a -L 4) > debug_artifacts/tree.txt 2>&1 || (find . -maxdepth 4 -print) > debug_artifacts/tree.txt 2>&1

      - name: Upload debug artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: debug-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}-${{ github.run_attempt }}
          path: debug_artifacts
          if-no-files-found: warn
          retention-days: 7
